component.name: FloatLyrics
component.summary: Floating synchronized lyrics for Spotify on Wayland
Wayland 桌面上的 Spotify 同步悬浮歌词
Wayland 桌面上的 Spotify 同步懸浮歌詞

description.p: FloatLyrics follows Spotify playback through MPRIS and displays synchronized lyrics in a lightweight GTK4 layer-shell overlay. Lyrics can be searched manually and cached locally.
FloatLyrics 通过 MPRIS 跟随 Spotify 播放状态，并在轻量的 GTK4 layer-shell 悬浮窗中显示 同步歌词。用户也可以手动搜索歌词，结果会缓存在本地。
FloatLyrics 透過 MPRIS 跟隨 Spotify 播放狀態，並在輕量的 GTK4 layer-shell 懸浮視窗中顯示 同步歌詞。使用者也可以手動搜尋歌詞，結果會快取在本機。

screenshot.caption: Settings with runtime language selection
支持动态语言切换的设置界面
支援動態語言切換的設定介面

description.p: Adds local romanization, customizable lyric styling, improved Chinese search, cache deduplication, and remembered window positions.
Improves configuration validation, lyrics settings, license attribution, and packaging workflows.
